drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T1(f2 in (false), f0 in ("zz", "zz", "a"), $b0_0_0 : f2)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    accumulate( T1(f1 in (0, 5.5)); $a1_0 : count() )
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
rule "R2"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    accumulate( T1($s2_0 : f1); $a2_0 : collectList($s2_0) )
    T1(f1 != 10, f2 == false)
then
end
rule "R3"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    ( $p3_0 : T1($b3_0_0 : f2, $b3_0_1 : f2) )
    or
    ( $p3_0 : T1($b3_0_0 : f2, $b3_0_1 : f2) )
    or
    ( $p3_0 : T1($b3_0_0 : f2, $b3_0_1 : f2) )
then
    delete($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
salience 6
when
    T1(f2 != false, $b4_0_0 : f1)
then
end
query Q0(boolean $qa0_0, long $qa0_1, long $qa0_2)
    $qp0_0 : T1(f2 == $qa0_0, f1 == $qa0_1, $qb0_0 : f0)
    $qp0_1 : T0(f0 == $qa0_1, f0 != 4)
    $qp0_2 : T1(f1 == $qa0_2, f0 == $qb0_0, f0 <= $qb0_0)
end

query Q1(boolean $qa1_0, String $qa1_1, long $qa1_2)
    ( $qp1_0 : T0(f1 == $qa1_0, f0 >= 4, f1 != false) and $qp1_1 : T1(f0 != "beta", f2 != true, $qb1_0 : f1, $qb1_1 : f0) )
    or
    ( $qp1_2 : T1(f0 == $qa1_1, f1 == $qa1_2) and $qp1_3 : T0(f1 == $qa1_0) )
end

rule QR0
when
    ?Q1(true, "b", -1000000007;)
    ?Q1(true, "", 100;)
then
    insert(new QOut(1, 10, 3.5, "", false));
end

rule QR1 salience 4
when
    T1()
    ?Q1($qr1_x0, "alpha", 100;)
    ?Q1($qr1_x1, "alpha", 3;)
then
    insert(new QOut(2, 100, -1.0, "a", true));
end

rule QR2
when
    T0($qr2_b0 : f0)
    ?Q0(false, $qr2_x0, $qr2_x1;)
then
    insert(new QOut(3, -2, $qr2_b0, "b", true));
end
